mapper.insert: INSERT INTO global_characters ( character_id, user_id, folder_id, name, aliases, profile_data, profile_confirmed, voice_id, voice_type, custom_voice_url, global_voice_id, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{characterId}, #{userId}, #{folderId}, #{name}, #{aliases, typeHandler=com.baomidou.mybatisplus.extension.handlers.JacksonTypeHandler}, #{profileData, typeHandler=com.baomidou.mybatisplus.extension.handlers.JacksonTypeHandler}, #{profileConfirmed}, #{voiceId}, #{voiceType}, #{customVoiceUrl}, #{globalVoiceId}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE global_characters SET name = #{name}, folder_id = #{folderId}, aliases = #{aliases, typeHandler=com.baomidou.mybatisplus.extension.handlers.JacksonTypeHandler}, profile_data = #{profileData, typeHandler=com.baomidou.mybatisplus.extension.handlers.JacksonTypeHandler}, profile_confirmed = #{profileConfirmed}, voice_id = #{voiceId}, voice_type = #{voiceType}, custom_voice_url = #{customVoiceUrl}, global_voice_id = #{globalVoiceId}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE character_id = #{characterId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM global_characters WHERE character_id = #{characterId} AND user_id = #{userId}
